// === M33 codemod: paste into <Composite>.ts ===
// Generated by generate-tab-childpanels.js for screen "character-ds3-main"
// Phase 1: imports (top of file)
import { CharacterDs3OverviewChild } from './CharacterDs3OverviewChild';
import { CharacterDs3StatsChild } from './CharacterDs3StatsChild';
import { CharacterDs3TacticsChild } from './CharacterDs3TacticsChild';
import { CharacterDs3BloodlineChild } from './CharacterDs3BloodlineChild';
import { CharacterDs3EquipChild } from './CharacterDs3EquipChild';
import { CharacterDs3AptitudeChild } from './CharacterDs3AptitudeChild';

// Phase 2: tab → ChildPanel resolver (inside CompositePanel class)
private _resolveChildPanelForTab(tabId: string): typeof ChildPanelBase | null {
    switch (tabId) {
      case 'overview': return CharacterDs3OverviewChild;
      case 'stats': return CharacterDs3StatsChild;
      case 'tactics': return CharacterDs3TacticsChild;
      case 'bloodline': return CharacterDs3BloodlineChild;
      case 'equip': return CharacterDs3EquipChild;
      case 'aptitude': return CharacterDs3AptitudeChild;
      default: return null;
    }
}

// Phase 3: in _switchToTab(tabId), replace the body with:
//   const Cls = this._resolveChildPanelForTab(tabId);
//   if (!Cls) { logger.warn(`unknown tab: ${tabId}`); return; }
//   this.mountChild(Cls, `Tab${capitalize(tabId)}Content`, { dataSource: 'config' });
